{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Iteration 217: Harrow
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Iteration]] 217 is named [[Harrow]] and is a desert.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13">''Blackflame'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Iteration]] 217 is named [[Harrow]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21">''Blackflame'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
